message:
chore: add url and assert2 dependencies, sync bead status tracking

Dependencies:
- Add url = "2.5" runtime dependency for URL parsing
- Add assert2 = "0.4.0" dev dependency for enhanced test assertions

Bead status updates:
- bd-1mdlj (registry storage): open -> in_progress
- bd-2fqyv.5.4 (control-plane coverage): in_progress -> closed
- bd-2fqyv.6.2 (migration executor): add close_reason note
- bd-3cnmb (actionable errors): open -> in_progress
- bd-3ewxi (execution receipts): in_progress -> closed
- bd-3s2x8 (E2E pipeline tests): open -> closed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
